mapper.select: SELECT /*+ USE_INDEX(t_erp_qc_inspection PRIMARY) */ id, batch_no, style_code, order_no, result, pass_rate, sample_qty, defect_qty, inspector_id, inspector_name, factory_id, status, reject_reason, qc_type, size_measure, needle_detect, recheck_count, defect_segment, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM t_erp_qc_inspection WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_erp_qc_inspection (batch_no, style_code, order_no, result, pass_rate, sample_qty, defect_qty, inspector_id, inspector_name, factory_id, status, qc_type, size_measure, needle_detect, recheck_count, defect_segment, remark, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{batchNo}, #{styleCode}, #{orderNo}, #{result}, #{passRate}, #{sampleQty}, #{defectQty}, #{inspectorId}, #{inspectorName}, #{factoryId}, #{status}, #{qcType}, #{sizeMeasure}, #{needleDetect}, #{recheckCount}, #{defectSegment}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_erp_qc_inspection SET status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'ACTIVE' AND result = 'HOLD' THEN 1 END) AS pendingCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() THEN 1 END) AS todayChecked, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN result = 'PASS' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS passRate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_erp_qc_defect_record dr INNER JOIN t_erp_qc_inspection qi ON dr.inspection_id = qi.id WHERE dr.defect_level = 'CRITICAL' AND qi.factory_id = #{factoryId}) AS criticalCount FROM t_erp_qc_inspection WHERE factory_id = #{factoryId}

SELECT dr.defect_type AS name, SUM(dr.qty) AS count FROM t_erp_qc_defect_record dr INNER JOIN t_erp_qc_inspection qi ON dr.inspection_id = qi.id WHERE qi.factory_id = #{factoryId} GROUP BY dr.defect_type ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 5
